title: Aether Gravitation
description: Addon for the Aether I, Add Battleaxe and other stuff.
body:
![Aether Gravitation Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/Aether-Gravitation/master/AetherGravitationLogo.png)
Aether Gravitation is an Aether I addon that add more tools, biomes and more to the Aether I.

it add Neptune tool set(no hoe) with a battleaxe for all the aether "metallic" tool set(Zanite, Gravitite, Valkyrie, Neptune)

The neptune toolset allow you to mine underwater without the penality.

The Battleaxe is an axe with sweeping.

items added can be found in the silver and gold dungeons.

Apothic Attributes, Mantle and Placebo are bundled in the 1.1.6 version(it respect the license of each mod).

![Ads](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/master/KineticHosting.png)
